tasks.label: build: exe (WORDLELX.EXE)
args: export WATCOM="$HOME/watcom-src/rel"; export PATH="$WATCOM/armo64:$PATH"; export INCLUDE="$WATCOM/h"; cd "/Users/jarrod/github/wordlelx"; "$WATCOM/armo64/wmake"; task_rc=$?; echo Task Complete; exit $task_rc

tasks.label: build: exm package (WORDLELX.EXM)
args: export WATCOM="$HOME/watcom-src/rel"; export PATH="$WATCOM/armo64:$PATH"; export INCLUDE="$WATCOM/h"; cd "/Users/jarrod/github/wordlelx/exm"; "$WATCOM/armo64/wmake" -f Makefile.wmake exm; task_rc=$?; echo Task Complete; exit $task_rc

tasks.label: generate: word data (WORDLELX.DAT)
args: mkdir -p "/Users/jarrod/github/wordlelx/output"; /usr/bin/python3 "/Users/jarrod/github/wordlelx/make_dat.py" "/Users/jarrod/github/wordlelx/output/WORDLELX.DAT"; task_rc=$?; echo Task Complete; exit $task_rc

tasks.label: generate: icon (WORDLELX.ICN)
args: mkdir -p "/Users/jarrod/github/wordlelx/output"; /usr/bin/python3 "/Users/jarrod/github/wordlelx/make_icon.py" "/Users/jarrod/github/wordlelx/output/WORDLELX.ICN"; task_rc=$?; echo Task Complete; exit $task_rc
